n: Blood of Azog: Will of the Stormhammer

steps.t: King Thorin can be found at Vosh Torú in the Lonely Mountain. After talking with King Thorin, Hermáth Stormhammer has agreed to aid Prince Durin and t…
Hersegg can be found at Vosh Torú in the Lonely Mountain. As King Thorin left Vosh Torú, Hersegg called you over. You should talk to Hersegg.
Hermáth Stormhammer can be found at Vosh Torú in the Lonely Mountain. In an effort to aid King Thorin, Hermáth Stormhammer has agreed to travel to Eld…
